moves.name: Stand LP
moves.notes: Fantastic range for a jab | Incurs 20% damage scaling penalty if used as the first hit of a combo

moves.name: Stand MP
moves.notes: Great poke / buffer / footsies tool in neutral with a hit confirmable Target Combo follow-up | Active frames 1-2 have shorter range

moves.name: Stand HP
moves.notes: Forces stand on hit | Further range foot hitbox cannot hit crouching opponents (shorter overall range against crouching opponents)

moves.name: Stand LK
moves.notes: Amazing range for a light normal (furthest of Elena's light normals) but doesn't combo into LK Spin Scythe like her jabs do | Incurs 20% damage scaling penalty if used as the first hit of a combo

moves.name: Stand MK
moves.notes: Core combo and frametrap tool | +2F extra recovery frames (15F) on whiff

moves.name: Stand HK
moves.notes: Crushes low attacks on frames 9-17 | Launches the opponent into a limited juggle state on Punish Counter

moves.name: Crouch LP
moves.notes: Chains into crouch LP / crouch LK | Incurs 20% damage scaling penalty if used as the first hit of a combo

moves.name: Crouch MP
moves.notes: Combo / Poke / Buffer tool with good range | Not an ideal anti-air despite looking like one

moves.name: Crouch HP
moves.notes: Upper body (legs) are invincible to airborne strikes on frames 8-19 | Core combo and anti-air tool

moves.name: Crouch LK
moves.notes: Chains into crouch LP / crouch LK | Incurs 20% damage scaling penalty if used as the first hit of a combo

moves.name: Crouch MK
moves.notes: +2F extra recovery frames (18F) on whiff or block | Incurs 20% damage scaling penalty if used as the first hit of a combo

moves.name: Crouch HK
moves.notes: Has some Juggle potential naturally without Drive Rush | Great range for a sweep but punishable by most other sweeps at max range

moves.name: Jump LP
moves.notes: Cross-up that can gain extra frame advantage with a Target Combo extension | Can be used as a fuzzy instant Overhead (except against Blanka) after a deep jump-in Heavy (or jump-in Mediums in Burnout as well)

moves.name: Jump MP
moves.notes: Puts airborne opponents into a limited juggle state | Can follow up with a Target Combo extension for an even stronger juggle

moves.name: Jump HP
moves.notes: Elena's strongest general purpose jump-in (reaches grounded opponents faster and deals all its damage in one hit unlike jump HK

moves.name: Jump LK
moves.notes: Strong hitbox priority (especially vertically downwards) that can beat or trade with many anti-air normals | Can be used as a fuzzy instant Overhead after a deep jump-in Heavy (or jump-in Mediums in Burnout as well)

moves.name: Jump MK
moves.notes: Cross-up | Has a wide hitbox in both directions

moves.name: Jump HK
moves.notes: First hit puts airborne opponents into a limited juggle state | Second hit causes a spiked knockdown on airborne opponents

moves.name: Trunk Slap 1
moves.notes: Mid-range poke tool with high pushback that's mostly at safe on block (except at close range against exceptionally far-reaching 4F normals) and deals a good amount of drive gauge damage on block | Easily hit confirmable into the Target Combo follow-up (21F hit confirm window)

moves.name: Handstand Whip 1
moves.notes: Overhead with fast start-up and decent range | Can be hit confirmed into the Target Combo follow-up (17F hit confirm window)

moves.name: Round Arch
moves.notes: Crushes low attacks on frames 9-17 and shifts Elena's throw hurtbox backward starting on frame 5 | Not actually airborne despite the animation

moves.name: Slide
moves.notes: Crouching state for the entire duration of the move (can slide under attacks that don't hit Crouch) but does not low profile under fireballs | Half-screen slide that hits low

moves.name: Starling Beak
moves.notes: Second hit is fully cancelable while the first hit is only Super cancelable | Second hit cannot hit crouching opponents

moves.name: Turning Tail
moves.notes: Both the follow-up hits on HP cannot hit crouching opponents | How unsafe the move is on block varies depending on if the opponent stand or crouch blocks the initial stand HP

moves.name: Hind Kick
moves.notes: Elena's core target combo conversion on crouching opponents (stand HP and crouch MK target combos both can't hit crouching opponents) | Launches the opponent into a limited juggle state on hit

moves.name: Fluttering Lark
moves.notes: Second hit is fully cancelable | Second hit cannot hit crouching opponents and will always whiff after blocked crouch MK (block data is only applicable if parried)

moves.name: Trunk Slap 2
moves.notes: Hit confirmable extension from Elena's long range f+HP that leads to a knockdown ender on hit | Has no juggle potential on its own (does not juggle after a wall splat)

moves.name: Trunk Slap Final
moves.notes: Target Combo ender with good corner carry and knockdown advantage | Can lead to auto-timed Lynx Whirl pressure on the opponent's wakeup

moves.name: Handstand Whip 2
moves.notes: Hit confirmable Target Combo that grants a meterless knockdown from Elena's long range overhead

moves.name: Soaring Raid
moves.notes: Both hits cross-up and grant Elena +12 frame advantage combo follow-ups on hit | If the opponent is crouching, Elena lands before the MK follow-up active frames come out

moves.name: Raptor Range
moves.notes: Both hits put airborne opponents into a limited juggle state | Cannot hit a grounded opponent

moves.name: Leg Tackle
moves.notes: Gets +70% damage increase (2040 damage), HKD (denies back-roll option on wake-up), and depletes 1 bar of Drive Gauge on a Punish Counter | Has a frame perfect corner throw loop against Zangief (dash + walk 2F)

moves.name: Leg Lift Throw
moves.notes: Gets +70% damage increase (2040 damage), HKD (denies back-roll option on wake-up), and depletes 1 bar of Drive Gauge on a Punish Counter | Cannot get throw oki after a corner side switch (except for a frame perfect Drive Rush + Throw against Zangief)

moves.name: Drive Impact: Giraffe Neck
moves.notes: 2 hits of armor on frames 1-27 | Damages opponents Drive Gauge on Block (1/2 bar) | Hit (1 bar) | Counter-Hit (1.25 bar) | Punish Counter (1.5 bar)

moves.name: Drive Reversal: Boar Charge
moves.notes: Fully invincible on frames 1-22 (frames 1-20 when used on wake-up as a Reversal) | Armor Break (blows through all armor like Drive Impact)

moves.name: Drive Parry
moves.notes: Parries all strikes and projectiles (high and low) from frame 1 | 12F parry window (can hold the parry to extend the parry window)

moves.name: Drive Rush
moves.notes: Dashes forward and enhances the next normal used out of the Drive Rush with +4 extra hitstun / blockstun (some moves also get unique properties enhanced such as juggle state) | The +4 bonus frame advantage gained from a Drive Rush enhanced move also stacks with any bonus frame advantage that move may have gained from Counter-Hit or Punish Counter

moves.name: Taunt
moves.notes: Framedata listed is for the down+Taunt version that deals a bit of damage (300) but is very punishable on hit or block | Back Taunt can transition to a handstand walk by holding forward or backward on frames 181-370

moves.name: LK Rhino Horn
moves.notes: Airborne on frames 13-36 (crushes Low attacks on frames 15-34) | Cannot hit crouching (core combo tool in all other situations)

moves.name: MK Rhino Horn
moves.notes: Airborne on frames 17-41 (crushes Low attacks on frames 19-39) | Cannot hit crouching (core combo tool in all other situations)

moves.name: HK Rhino Horn
moves.notes: Airborne on frames 21-45 (crushes Low attacks on frames 23-43) | Cannot hit crouching (core combo tool in all other situations)

moves.name: OD Rhino Horn
moves.notes: Airborne on frames 11-38 (crushes Low attacks on frames 13-35) | Cannot hit crouching (core combo tool in all other situations)

moves.name: LK Scratch Wheel
moves.notes: Invincible to airborne strikes on frames 1-9 | Airborne on frames 7-34 (Forced Knockdown state)

moves.name: MK Scratch Wheel
moves.notes: Invincible to airborne strikes on frames 1-11 | Airborne on frames 7-41 (Forced Knockdown state)

moves.name: HK Scratch Wheel
moves.notes: Invincible to airborne strikes on frames 1-12 | Airborne on frames 7-46 (Forced Knockdown state)

moves.name: OD Scratch Wheel
moves.notes: Fully invincible on frames 1-8 | Airborne on frames 7-52 (Forced Knockdown state)

moves.name: LP Lynx Song
moves.notes: Projectile invincible on frames 11-21 | Crouch size hurtbox (but still in a Standing state) on frames 3-26

moves.name: MP Lynx Song
moves.notes: Projectile invincible on frames 11-22 | Crouch size hurtbox (but still in a Standing state) on frames 3-26

moves.name: HP Lynx Song
moves.notes: Projectile invincible on frames 11-24 | Crouch size hurtbox (but still in a Standing state) on frames 3-26

moves.name: OD Lynx Song (Lynx Whirl)
moves.notes: Gives Elena instant access to the Lynx Whirl (enhanced) follow-ups without requiring a second roll (very useful for combos / pressure / punishing projectiles) | Projectile invincible on frames 8-26

moves.name: Lynx Song > Leopard Snap
moves.notes: Combo / Poke / Harassment tool that's mostly safe on block due to the pushback | Elena loses her Projectile invincibility and Crouch size hurtboxes from the prior Lynx Song (Roll) immediately when she transitions into this follow-up (the other follow-ups maintain those properties for longer and are thus more suited for countering projectiles)

moves.name: Lynx Song > Harvest Circle
moves.notes: Projectile invincible on frames 1-10 (not factoring in the Projectile invincibility frames from the prior Lynx Song roll) | Extended kick hurtbox is invincible to airborne strikes on frames 8-10 (during the active frames) to help with anti-airing

moves.name: Lynx Song > Mallet Smash
moves.notes: Overhead + Low & Throw Crush tool | Projectile invincible on frames 5-24 (top Head hurtbox section is not Projectile invincible)

moves.name: Lynx Whirl
moves.notes: Accessible from either a prior Lynx Song roll (QCF+P) or Spin Scythe (QCB+K) | Projectile invincible on frames 1-21 on the Light version or frames 1-26 on the Medium / Heavy versions (not factoring in the Crouch size hurtboxes from the prior Lynx Song roll (QCF+P) or Spin Scythe (QCB+K) specials)

moves.name: OD Lynx Whirl
moves.notes: Accessible from a prior OD Lynx Song roll (QCF+PP) | Projectile invincible on frames 1-26 (not factoring in the Crouch size hurtboxes from the prior OD Lynx Song roll (QCF+PP))

moves.name: Lynx Whirl > Leopard Snap
moves.notes: Combo / Pressure tool that lets Elena continue her pressure even on block (+1) | On block, the opponent can walk back to avoid throw midscreen (but Elena is left close enough to hitconfirm from Crouch LK)

moves.name: Lynx Whirl > Harvest Circle
moves.notes: Projectile invincible on frames 1-10 (not factoring in the Projectile invincibility frames from the prior Lynx Whirl roll) | Extended kick hurtbox is invincible to airborne strikes on frames 8-10 (during the active frames) to help with anti-airing

moves.name: Lynx Whirl > Mallet Smash
moves.notes: Overhead + Low & Throw Crush tool | Projectile invincible on frames 5-27 (top Head hurtbox section is not Projectile invincible) - not factoring in the Projectile invincibility frames from the prior Lynx Whirl roll

moves.name: LK Spin Scythe
moves.notes: First 2 hits force stand on hit (so the last 2 hits to also combo) | Further range foot hitbox on the first 2 hits cannot hit crouching opponents (shorter overall range against crouching opponents, which can affect whiff punishes)

moves.name: MK Spin Scythe
moves.notes: First 2 hits force stand on hit (so the last 2 hits to also combo) | Further range foot hitbox on the first 2 hits cannot hit crouching opponents (shorter overall range against crouching opponents, which can affect whiff punishes)

moves.name: HK Spin Scythe
moves.notes: First 2 hits force stand on hit (so the last 2 hits to also combo) | Further range foot hitbox on the first 2 hits cannot hit crouching opponents (shorter overall range against crouching opponents, which can affect whiff punishes)

moves.name: Spin Scythe > Lynx Whirl
moves.notes: Start-up listed refers to the different versions of Spin Scythe (LK/MK/HK) used before canceling into Lynx Whirl (enhanced Roll) | Recovery frames and Frame advantages listed refers to the different versions of Lynx Whirl roll (LP/MP/HP) canceled into

moves.name: OD Spin Scythe
moves.notes: First 2 hits force stand on hit (so the last 2 hits to also combo) | Further range foot hitbox on the first 2 hits cannot hit crouching opponents (shorter overall range against crouching opponents, which can affect whiff punishes)

moves.name: OD Spin Scythe > Lynx Whirl
moves.notes: Start-up listed refers to OD Spin Scythe used before canceling into Lynx Whirl (enhanced Roll) | Recovery frames and Frame advantages listed refers to the different versions of Lynx Whirl roll (LP/MP/HP) canceled into

moves.name: LP Moon Glider
moves.notes: Slightly evasive tool that's safe on block and grants follow-up combos on whiff punish (Punish Counter) | Elena sways back slightly on frames 5-14 (reaches maximum sway back distance on frame 5)

moves.name: MP Moon Glider
moves.notes: Evasive tool that's safe on block and grants follow-up combos on whiff punish (Punish Counter) | Elena sways back on frames 5-18 (reaches maximum sway back distance on frame 9)

moves.name: HP Moon Glider
moves.notes: Very evasive tool that's safe on block and grants follow-up combos on whiff punish (Punish Counter) | Elena sways back quite a lot on frames 5-23 (reaches maximum sway back distance on frames 14-16)

moves.name: Moon Glider Follow-up
moves.notes: Follow-up option from the Moon Glider sway that's hit confirmable (18F window) | Puts the opponent into a limited juggle state on hit (can only really extend the combo by canceling into SA3 / CA)

moves.name: OD Moon Glider
moves.notes: Evasive tool that's safe on block and grants follow-up combos on whiff punish (Punish Counter) | Elena sways back on frames 5-19 (reaches maximum sway back distance on frame 9

moves.name: OD Moon Glider Follow-up
moves.notes: Follow-up option from the OD Moon Glider sway that's hit confirmable (18F window) | Puts the opponent into a limited juggle state on hit (can only really extend the combo by canceling into SA2 / SA3 / CA

moves.name: Meteor Volley
moves.notes: Invincible to airborne strikes on frames 1-21 | Has no strike/throw/projectile invincibility (cannot be used as a reversal)

moves.name: Revival Dance
moves.notes: Fully invincible on frames 1-17 | Armor Break

moves.name: Song of the Grasslands
moves.notes: Fully invincible on frames 1-11 | Armor Break

moves.name: Song of the Grasslands (Critical Art)
moves.notes: Fully invincible on frames 1-11 | Armor Break
